---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: _bibliography/papers.bib
page-layout: full
---
<!-- 
## Working papers

[8] **Jun Yamamoto**, Márton Pósfai, Ginestra Bianconi, Albert-László Barabási, Johan Åkerman, et al.
"Synchronization in networks of spin Hall nano-oscillators."

[7] Charlotte Geier, **Jun Yamamoto**, and Márton Pósfai.
"Synchronization and coarse-graining in heterogeneous networks of modules."

[6] Shogo Mizutaka, **Jun Yamamoto**, and Kousuke Yakubo.
"Structural crossover of complex networks: bridging degree correlation and fractality." 
-->

## Preprints

[5] **Jun Yamamoto**, Ivan Bonamassa, and Márton Pósfai.
"Laplacian eigenmode localization in physical complex networks." 
Manuscript submitted (2026). Joint submission with arXiv:2607.19486.


[4] **Jun Yamamoto**, Ivan Bonamassa, and Márton Pósfai.
"Localization transitions of diffusion dynamics in physical networks."
arXiv:2607.19486 (2026). <span class="publication-links" aria-label="Publication links">
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--arxiv" href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2607.19486" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View preprint on arXiv">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-arxiv"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">arXiv</span>
  </a>
</span>

## Journal articles


[3] Marta Niedostatek, Anthony Baptista, **Jun Yamamoto**, Jurgen Kurths, Ruben Sanchez Garcia, Ben MacArthur, and Ginestra Bianconi. 
"Mining higher-order triadic interactions."
Nature Commununications **16**, 11613 (2025). <span class="publication-links" aria-label="Publication links">
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-66577-z" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View published article via DOI">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-doi"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">DOI</span>
  </a>
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--arxiv" href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2404.14997" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View preprint on arXiv">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-arxiv"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">arXiv</span>
  </a>
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--github" href="https://github.com/anthbapt/trim" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View code repository on GitHub">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">GitHub</span>
  </a>
</span>

[2] Kousuke Yakubo, Gentaro Shimojo, **Jun Yamamoto**. 
"Random walks on bifractal networks."
Physical Review E **110**, 064318 (2024). <span class="publication-links" aria-label="Publication links">
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.110.064318" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View published article via DOI">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-doi"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">DOI</span>
  </a>
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--arxiv" href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2407.16183" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View preprint on arXiv">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-arxiv"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">arXiv</span>
  </a>
</span>

[1] **Jun Yamamoto** and Kousuke Yakubo. 
"Bifractality of fractal scale-free networks."
Physical Review E **108**, 024302 (2023). <span class="publication-links" aria-label="Publication links">
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.108.024302" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View published article via DOI">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-doi"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">DOI</span>
  </a>
  <a class="publication-badge publication-badge--arxiv" href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2304.13438" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View preprint on arXiv">
    <span class="publication-badge__icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="ai ai-arxiv"></i></span>
    <span class="publication-badge__label">arXiv</span>
  </a>
</span>



## Theses


[MSc] **Jun Yamamoto**. 
"Modelling higher-order network dynamics in presence of triadic interactions."
Master Dissertation, Queen Mary University of London (2023). 
<!-- \[[pdf](./assets/files/thesis/MSc_dissertation.pdf)\] -->

[BEng] **Jun Yamamoto**. 
"Bifractality of fractal scale-free networks."
Bachelor Thesis, Hokkaido University (2022).
<!-- \[[pdf](./assets/files/thesis/BEng_thesis.pdf)\] -->
